g.text: * Constant current sink, required for any USB-C Source role.

g.desc: * Constant current sink, required for any USB-C Source role.

g.text: * Can be non-populated if not using board as a USB-PD Source.

g.desc: * Can be non-populated if not using board as a USB-PD Source.

g.text: * Sink current ~75mA, regardless of voltage. ~300uA max quiescent ONLY when sinking.

g.desc: * Sink current ~75mA, regardless of voltage. ~300uA max quiescent ONLY when sinking.

g.text: * Time to discharge to 1V, 100uF VBUS capacitance: 20V = ~80ms; 5V = ~11ms

g.desc: * Time to discharge to 1V, 100uF VBUS capacitance: 20V = ~80ms; 5V = ~11ms

g.text: [input-usb] USB-C Connector: Protections, Filter and VUSB Discharge

g.desc: [input-usb] USB-C Connector: Protections, Filter and VUSB Discharge
